# CGLineCap.round

**Case**

A line with a rounded end. Core Graphics draws the line to extend beyond the endpoint of the path. The line ends with a semicircular arc with a radius of 1/2 the line’s width, centered on the endpoint.

## Declaration

```swift
case round
```

## Constants

- **CGLineCap.butt**: A line with a squared-off end. Core Graphics draws the line to extend only to the exact endpoint of the path. This is the default.
- **CGLineCap.square**: A line with a squared-off end. Core Graphics extends the line beyond the endpoint of the path for a distance equal to half the line width.
